code: import{useState}from"react";import{loginUser}from"../api";import{useNavigate,Link}from"react-router-dom";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function Login(){const[form,setForm]=useState({username:"",password:""});const navigate=useNavigate();const submit=async()=>{try{const res=await loginUser(form);alert(res.message);localStorage.setItem("userId",res.user_id);navigate("/doctor");}catch(err){alert(err.message);}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{placeholder:"Username",onChange:e=>setForm({...form,username:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Password",onChange:e=>setForm({...form,password:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{onClick:submit,children:"Login"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Don't have an account?"," ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Link,{to:"/register",children:"Register"})]})]});}
